home.metaTitle: CS2Hideout — Hideout Marketplace for CS2 Traders
home.metaDesc: Community-first CS2 skin trading & deal discovery for Southeast Asia. Zero fees. Buy, sell, trade.
home.heroSub: Buy, Sell, Trade — Zero Fees. Ever.

market.metaDesc: Browse CS2 skin listings across SEA. Sell, trade, or both. Zero fees.
market.title: Marketplace
market.subtitle: {count} active listings · Zero fees · Trades happen directly on Steam
market.emptySub: Try widening your search — there's always a deal somewhere.

skinDetail.notFoundSub: It may have been sold or removed.
skinDetail.shield: CS2Hideout never touches your items. Trade happens directly on Steam.

create.title: Post a listing
create.subtitle: Three quick steps. We never touch your items — buyers reach out via Steam directly.
create.notesPlaceholder: Open to offers, low float, etc.
create.step2: What do you want for it?
create.tradeUrlHelpStrong: Steam → Inventory → Trade Offers → Who can send me trade offers
create.tradeUrlHelpPost: . We'll save it to your profile so you only enter it once.
create.agree: By posting, you agree to keep trades respectful and on-Steam. Off-platform scams are reported and banned immediately.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Where SEA traders hang out, post deals, and talk skins.

matches.metaDesc: Live, upcoming, and completed CS2 matches — your local time zone.
matches.title: Match Hub
matches.subtitle: All times shown in your local time zone.
matches.empty: No matches in this view yet — check back soon.

premium.metaDesc: Unlock real-time alerts, early listings, advanced filters and more.
premium.subtitle: The serious trader's edge. Built for SEA, priced fairly, and locked in for founding members.
premium.founders: ★ First 500 members lock in this price forever
features: Early access to new listings (15 min before public)
Advanced deal filters (float range, pattern index)
Price history charts (90 days vs 30 days free)

login.title: Welcome back, trader
login.subtitle: Sign in with Steam — we never see your password, and we never touch your items.

quickBuy.metaTitle: Quick Buy — Sell Your CS2 Skins to CS2Hideout
quickBuy.metaDesc: Sell your CS2 skins directly to us at a guaranteed price. Payment released after Steam Trade Protection expires.
quickBuy.homeStrip: Want to sell your skin fast? Sell directly to us — guaranteed payment after Trade Protection expires
quickBuy.heroSub: Sell your skins directly to us — guaranteed payment after Steam Trade Protection expires, no waiting for a P2P buyer
quickBuy.step1Body: Browse our buy list and find your skin
quickBuy.step2Body: Send us your skin details for review, our team responds within 24 hours
quickBuy.step3Body: Complete the Steam trade, receive payment once Trade Protection expires
quickBuy.protectionInfo: Steam's Trade Protection policy allows sellers to cancel trades within 7 days. We release payment immediately once the protection period expires — this protects both you and us.
quickBuy.emptyList: No active buy listings right now — check back soon.
quickBuy.submitDisclaimer: Our team will respond within 24 hours. Payment is processed after Steam Trade Protection expires (7 days) to protect both parties.
quickBuy.submitSuccess: Offer sent! Our team will contact you within 24 hours.
quickBuy.submitError: Could not send your offer. Please try again.
quickBuy.whyFairBody: Prices based on real market data, updated daily. Always shown as a transparent % of market value.
quickBuy.whySafeBody: All trades through official Steam Trade system. We never ask for your password or Steam credentials.
quickBuy.whyPayBody: Once you complete the Steam trade and protection expires, payment is guaranteed. No exceptions.
quickBuy.panelSub: Don't want to wait for a buyer? Sell to us at a guaranteed price
quickBuy.panelDisclaimer: Payment after Trade Protection expires (7 days)

footer.tagline: Community-built. Zero fees. Just traders helping traders find great deals across SEA.
footer.copyright: © 2026 CS2Hideout · Not affiliated with Valve. CS2 and skin names © Valve.
